reasoning: The statistical tool provides a primary anchor of 0.40 for the probability of LVS exceeding 57.15, heavily influenced by negative seasonality and the massive Q4 earnings drop on Jan 29. While the stock has seen a solid rebound (climbing from 52 to 57), showing positive momentum, there are still structural concerns around Macau EBITDA margins. However, with Chinese New Year beginning on February 17, 2026, positive catalysts around Macau visitation could counteract some of the negative sentiment and seasonality. Balancing the tool's 0.40 anchor with the positive fundamental catalyst of CNY and the fact that stock moves over short periods are largely mean-reverting or unpredictable, I slightly adjust the 1-week probability upward to 0.44. For the March 17 resolution, uncertainty increases, dragging the probability closer to the long-term base rate of 0.5, so I estimate 0.48.
